audit_input.task_goal: make the one-legged hopper move forward while staying upright and controlled

audit_output.reason: No video provided. The current reward only incentivizes forward velocity, neglecting 'staying upright and controlled' from the task goal. This setup is highly prone to reward hacking where the agent might achieve forward velocity by falling, sliding, or using excessive energy, which cannot be verified without visual data. The proposed weights address these unrewarded aspects of the task goal.
